subject: Android 13, a large muscular humanoid figure wearing a green vest and cap, in a powerful forward-facing combat stance with one arm raised
description: A large, powerfully built humanoid figure stands in an aggressive combat stance with one arm raised. The figure wears a distinctive green vest and a cap. The body language is threatening and dominant — massive build, confident posture. Energy or force lines radiate around the figure against a warm golden-orange background. The figure's muscular frame and characteristic outfit are the primary visual identifiers.
foreground: large muscular figure in green vest and cap, one arm raised, powerful stance
